commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: style
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: Changes that do not affect the meaning of the code (white-space, formatting, missing semi-colons, etc)

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: refactor
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: perf
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: A code change that improves performance

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: test
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: build
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: Changes that affect the build system or external dependencies (example scopes: gulp, broccoli, npm)

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: ci
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: Changes to our CI configuration files and scripts (example scopes: Travis, Circle, BrowserStack, SauceLabs)

commitAssistant.commitTypes.label: chore
commitAssistant.commitTypes.description: Other changes that don't modify src or test files
